title: Menmamenma 50 Pack Small Containers with Lids for Storage Slime Containers Sauce Pots Plastic Leakproof Sauces Cups for Jars, Dips, Salads, Chutney, Restaurants, Takeaway, Catering (4oz/100ml)
features: [Slime Storage Container Size] - Upper caliber is 70mm/2.87in, Lower caliber is 60mm/2.36in , Height is 45mm/1.77in. The package includes total 50pcs plastic slime storage containers with lids that can be loaded with 4 oz liquids.

[Sturdy and BPA Free] - These BPA Free Lids Condiment Containers are thick and durability and won't get crushed when you use them. They are non-toxic, transparent and stretchy to withstand everyday wear and tear and freezer.

[Stackable and Handy] - Our bulk pack of small containers with lids are compact and very easy to handle, thanks to their sturdy but lightweight design. The cups are stackable and do not occupy too much space in the kitchen or pantry, so keep them always at hand for meal prep and storage.

[Convenient and Practical] - Clear plastic round containers are designed to be leakproof and are great for food storage. The containers are air tight and keep food fresh for longer. These containers are perfect for parties, barbecues, summer festivals, and picnics and all kinds of celebrations.

[Wide Application] - These small plastic containers with lids is perfect for all kinds of sauces or small objects, such as salad dressing, oil, Sauces, Dips, Craft items, Jewellery ect. Can be used for a wide range of catering, food serving, food delivery services by small and large businesses and restaurants alike.Enough for your daily needs.
description: Product Description The independent sauce box is clean and hygienic, allowing you to enjoy fresh food. The plastic food container made of food graded PP plastic, non-toxic and odorless, leak-proof, can be in direct contact with food. Our jelly shot cups are suitable for storing various sauces or small foods, such as ketchup, chutney, tannin, chocolate sauce, salad dressing, oil, vinegar or minced garlic, a perfect choice for storing small foods or sauces. Perfect Capacity The small size will help keep supplies nicely organized, and easy to find. Good Material The container is made of quality PP and non recyclable plastic. It has good flexibility and durability. Good Sealing The perfect small container for any use!Condiments!The small plastic cup containers with lid make it easy to provide small amounts or portion control of various condiments.
